headline: Monolithic Power Systems Inc (NASDAQ:MPWR): A Textbook Quality Investment for Long-Term Growth
summary: Quality investing favors companies with durable advantages and strong finances. Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) exemplifies this with 21% revenue growth, 25% ROIC, zero debt, and expanding margins.
